# Add central task and deadline center

## Summary

Implement a central task and deadline center that aggregates reminders, warnings, and review tasks across all domains.

## Why

ocent already contains many domain-specific alerts and review situations. They need one operational entry point instead of being scattered across dashboards.

## Scope

- aggregate reminders and warnings across finance, documents, storage, and contracts
- include review tasks for AI suggestions and enrichment gaps
- include upcoming contract actions and inventory actions
- define prioritization and due-date logic

## Acceptance Criteria

- the central task center purpose is documented
- core task categories are explicitly listed
- prioritization and due-date concepts are defined
- the output supports later UI and notification implementation
